meta.title: Air Force Basic Training - Graduation - Week 7
meta.description:
Week 7 means one thing, it's Graduation time! This week is all about how the trainee has transitioned from civilian into a fully fledged member of the Air Force. 

The Airman's run is the first event where the trainees run in front of their loved ones, the first time they'll have seen them in almost 2 months. 
The Retreat Ceremony is next where trainee's officially receive their Airmen's coin and become Airmen. Families join their new Airmen on the retreat after the ceremony where they spend time together. 
The following day, the Graduation parade takes place with the new Airmen on the Enlisted Heroes Walk.Get training advice from former Drill Instructors and recruits delivered to your Sandboxx app every week. 

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?
Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting that training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
